title: Stop Uploading Your Files to Random Websites
content:
Ever noticed how most “free” image/PDF compressors work?
👉 Upload your file
👉 Wait
👉 Download
Simple… but also kinda risky.
Where does your file actually go?

So I built my own.
A privacy-first image & PDF compressor that runs entirely in your browser.

No uploads
No servers
No tracking

Your files never leave your device. Period.

Why I did this
Because I got tired of sending potentially sensitive files to random servers just to shrink a few KB.
And honestly… we can do better as devs.

I wrote the full story 👇
(build process + tech decisions + lessons learned)
👉 https://kusumalabs.com/2026/04/21/how-i-built-a-privacy-first-image-and-pdf-compressor-with-ai/

Let me know what you think 🙌
